pages.text:
Usually, you enter The End by finding a Stronghold. However, there's no Strongholds in the world here. So what you do here?

To enter The End here, you need to make an Eye of Ender, and throw it into a rift. This will collapse it. Finally, rifts are useful for something...

You may also want to get some flight before visiting The End. The combination of Magical Wings and a glider is pretty decent for that. Alternatively, you can use the Roots's Flight spell, which gives Flight for a limited amount of time (and has to be refreshed quite often).
